message:
🐛 Migrate Weather, StockMarketTicker, GitHubCIMonitor to useCache (#887)

These 3 cards were using raw useState/useEffect fetch patterns, causing
data loss on navigation. Migrate to the shared useCache infrastructure
for SQLite WASM persistence and stale-while-revalidate.

- Weather: Combined 3 separate state vars into single WeatherData type
- StockMarketTicker: Removed manual refresh interval & symbol change effects
- GitHubCIMonitor: Wrapped workflow data + isDemo flag in single cache entry

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
